ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team */,
  "game_result" INTEGER /* Result of the game (win/loss) */,
  "game_score" REAL /* Game score */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the game */,
  "referees" TEXT /* List of referees who officiated the game */,
  "play_by_play_data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the play_by_play_data table */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the game record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the game record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player is on */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "jersey_number" TEXT /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" TEXT /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "minutes_played" TEXT /* Minutes played */,
  "fg" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "orb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "drb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "trb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus statistic */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the statistic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the statistic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_by_play_data" (
  "play_by_play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play-by-play entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "play_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the play */,
  "time_remaining" TEXT /* Time remaining in the game when the play occurred */,
  "play_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the play */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score at the time of the play */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the play (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the play-by-play entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the play-by-play entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_by_play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_by_play_data_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_by_play_data_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, front office) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions the user has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
